---
name: Question or Request
about: Ask a question or make a general request
title: "[QUESTION/REQUEST] "
labels: question/request
assignees: ''
---

## Type
<!-- Check one by replacing [ ] with [x] -->
- [ ] Question — I need help understanding something
- [ ] Feature Request — I'd like to suggest something new
- [ ] Enhancement — I'd like to improve something existing
- [ ] Other

## Summary
<!-- Required: A clear and concise one-liner describing your question or request -->

## Background & Context
<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? Why does this matter to you?
     Include any relevant background that helps us understand the bigger picture. -->

## Details
<!-- For questions: what specifically are you unsure about?
     For requests: describe what you'd like in as much detail as possible.
     The more detail you provide, the faster we can help. -->

## What have you already tried?
<!-- Have you checked the docs, existing issues, or Stack Overflow?
     Have you attempted any workarounds? What happened? -->

- Docs/resources checked:
- Things attempted:
- Result:

## Expected vs Actual (if applicable)
<!-- If something isn't working as you'd expect, describe:
     What you expected: 
     What actually happens: -->

## Environment (if applicable)
<!-- Fill in any that are relevant -->
- OS:
- Version / Branch:
- Browser (if relevant):
- Other relevant config:

## Additional Context
<!-- Optional: screenshots, links, error messages, or code snippets -->

---
<!-- Before submitting, please confirm:
     [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
     [ ] I have provided enough detail for someone unfamiliar with my setup to understand -->
